'''EG-67''' was an [[EG-6 power droid/Legends|EG-6 power droid]] for sale at [[Jawa Traders]] in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. His memory had been [[Memory wipe/Legends|wiped]] haphazardly many times, resulting in fragments of memory of former owners and previous events. EG-67 tended to embellish these fragments into fanciful stories, which due to his limited communications he could only tell to other [[Droid/Legends|Droids]]. This left him with a rather cranky attitude.<ref name="GG7" />
